titleStmt.title: SII 17.586: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 586. (A.R. No. 541 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple, right of entrance.
This record commences with the praśasti pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc., of Kulōttuṅga I.

It states that the sabhā of Pudukkuḍi, a brahmadēya in Tirūvārūr-kkūṟṟam in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, having assembled at the Dēvāśriyan sold and made tax-free various pieces of lands with all rights of irrigation to Tribhuvanamuḍaiyān Irājēndraśōḻan alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Malaiyarājapanmar, a paṇimagan, resident in the place, who paid 24 1/4 kaḻañju of gold and donated the land for daily worship and offerings to the deity Umai Naṅgai set up at the Ulaguyyakkoṇḍa-kāmakkōṭṭam. The treasury is called Tyāgavinōdaṉ and the standard weight stone is stated to be equivalent to Tyāgavinōdaṉ-māḍai.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmātuviḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa ṉilamakaḷ ṉilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavarnilaikeṭavillavaṟkulaitara Eṉaimaṉnavar Iḻiya luṟṟaḻitara tikkaṉaittum taṉcakkaranaṭātti virasiṅṅāsanattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripatmar
tribhuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 4 vatu keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurkkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam putukkuṭiyil Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmanapaṭṭanum Uṟuppuṭṭur nārāyaṇanum Uṟuppuṭṭaṭur kaṉtaiya paṭṭanum Iḻakkantiṟattu saṅhārasiṅkaṭṭanum kūviṇṭur kovindabha
ṭṭanum Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyom tiruvārur tevāśrī vaṇat=tu kūṭṭaṅkuṟaivaṟa kūṭiyiruṉtu Āticaṇṭecuvaratevarkku nilavilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr Irukkum paṇi makan tiripuvanamuṭaiyān Irājentracoḻanāna kulottuṅkacoḻa malaiyarājapanmar Ula kuyyakkoṇṭakā
makkoṭṭat=tu Eḻun=taruḷiyirukkum Umainaṅkai māṟṟukkum nilai nimantattukkum nilanimantattukkum nilaṅkoḷḷa tiyākavinotaṉ paṇṭārattu meṟpaṭiyārmāṭaiyokka kuṭiṉaikkallāl Oṭukkinapoṉ Irupattu nāṟkkaḻañcu Araiyum nāṅkaḷ kaik⌈
koṇṭu Ivvāticaṇṭecuvaratevarkku Ippe koṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka cantrātit=tavaṟ cācuvatiyamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilat=tu kiḻpāṟkkellai śrīmulastānamuṭaiyār nampi tirukkaḷ nilattukku meṟkkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ālaṅkuḷattukkum kommaṭittiṭa
lukkum terkkum meṟpāṟkkellai śrīmulastāna nilattukkuk kiḻakkum teṉpāṟkellai nāṭṭār vākkālukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāṉkellai Uḷ taṭiyiIraṇṭiṉāl kuḻi Āyiram Orunūṟṟu Irupat=tu Añci nāl nilam Araiyemākāṇi Iṉnam Ivar
kke viṟṟukkuṭut=ta nilat=tukku kiḻpāṟkkellai taccaṉilat=tuk=ku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai Ālaṅkuḷat=tukkum kommaṭit=tiṭalukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai śrīmulattānamuṭaiyār teṟpuṟat=tukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kalitiraṉ vāykkālukku teṟkkumāka Ivvicaitta ⌈
perunāṅkellaiyuḷ naṭuvavupaṭṭa kuḻi munṉūṟṟu Aimpatināle mummāvaraiyum Iṉnam Ivarkkey viṟṟukkuṭut=ta nilat=tukku kiḻpāṟkellai teṟpput=tukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai cellūr Ellaikkum nāṭṭār vāykkālukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai putukkuṭi vāykkālukku ki
ḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vāyaṟṟūr Ellai vāykkālukkum kalitiraṉ vāykkālukku teṟkkumāka Ivvicain=ta perunānkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭiyiraṇṭināl 1 kuḻi EṇṇūṟṟuIrupat=tu Aiñcināl nilam Eṭṭumākkāṇiyum Iṉnam Ivaṟke viṟṟukkuṭutta nilat=tukku kiḻpāṟkellai tirumeṟ
koyil Āḻvār nilat=tukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kalitiravākkālukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai vāyaṟṟūr Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai keṅyilā ṉint=tukkum tirumeykāvalp puṟat=tukkum vaṭṭamaṇiyāṉ nilat=tukkum teṟkkumāka Ivicain=ta perunānkellai Uḷ
naṭuvupaṭṭa taṭi Iraṇṭināl kuḻi muvāyiratturuṉūṟṟu Aimpatināl nilam Oṉṟaraiye Irumāvaraiyum viṟṟukkuṭut=tukkoḷvatāna poṉ Irupat=tu ṉāṟ kkaḻañcarai Ippoṉ Irupattuṉāṟkkaḻañcaraiyum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kaaic celavaṟakkoṇṭu ntrādittavaṟ cācuvatikamāka Iṟaiyili paṇ
ṇik kuṭuttom Ivvāticaṇṭecuradevaṟkku Ipputukkuṭi sabhaiyom Iṉ nilat=tukku Ituvey vilai Āvatākavum Ituvey poruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷ cela volaiyāvatarakavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷ cela volai kāṭṭak kaṭavarallātāraākavum Ippaṭi Icain=tu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷ
Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytukuṭuttom cantrādittavaṟ cācuvatikamāka Iḻaiyili paṇṇikkuṭuttom Āti caṇṭecuradevaṟkku Ipputukkuṭi sabhaiyom Iṉ nilattu paṇṭu nirpāyum vāykkāla l nirpāyap peṟuvatākavum paṇṭu nir vārumpaṭiye nirvāravum peṟuvatākavum ceynir veṭṭiyu
maṟṟum tiruvācalil poṉta kuṭimai ceyyak kaṭavarallātārākavum Ipparicicain=tu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvāticaṇṭecuvaradevaṟku Ipputukkuṭi sabhaikkuc camain=ta Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmanapaṭṭaṉum Uṟuppuṭṭur nārāyaṇapaṭṭanum Iḻakkan=tiṟattu śrīnārasiṁhapaṭṭa
num Uṟuppuṭṭur kan=taiyapaṭṭanum kūvaṇṭur kovin=tapaṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Uḷḷiṭṭa sabhaiyom Ipparicu kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvārākavum Ipparicu Icain=tu viṟṟuk=kuṭuttom Āticaṇṭecuradevaṟkku Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmanapaṭṭaṉum Uṟuppuṭṭur nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Iḻakkaṉtiṟat=tu śrīnārasiṁhapaṭṭanum Uṟuppu
ṭṭūr kan=tayapaṭṭanum kūvaṇṭur kovin=tapaṭṭanum Ivvaṉaivom paṇiyāl I sthan māttūruṭaiṅāṉ kovin=tan Apavaṉ Eḻut=tu .. Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmanapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Uṟuppuṭuru nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uṟuppuṭṭur kantaiyapaṭṭan Eḻut=tu Ivai Iḻukkaṉtiṟattu śrīnārasiṅhabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai kūvaṇṭurk kovintapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai Uṟuppuṭṭur vāmaṉapaṭṭan Eḻut Ivai kavuciyan Ātittan nāyapirān Eḻuttu Ivai kāśyapan cantiracekara Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāratāyan ninṟān viṟṟiruntān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.586 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
